pi_items.source: Both attendees confirmed in task.json description (line 5) and setup_data.py (line 46: Grace Patel, line 45: Frank Rivera) as created contacts with emails grace.patel@northbridge.org and frank.rivera@northbridge.org

Task description (line 5) explicitly states 'Administrator must NOT be listed as an attendee'. Mitchell Admin appears in export_result.sh (line 101) as an admin account name check and in episode artifacts as the actual logged-in Odoo user name. Both are checked as forbidden in verifier logic.

privileged_info_summary: This task operates on synthetic Odoo scheduling data created by setup_data.py. The task requires scheduling a meeting named 'Executive Severance Review' for two specific attendees: Grace Patel (CFO, email grace.patel@northbridge.org) and Frank Rivera (HR Business Partner, email frank.rivera@northbridge.org) on a Thursday at 14:00 (2:00 PM) in location 'HR Private Office'. Critically, both 'Administrator' and 'Mitchell Admin' accounts must not appear as attendees in the final meeting - the admin user must remove themselves. The target date is dynamically calculated as Thursday of the week starting next Monday from task execution time. All attendee names, locations, and timing requirements are verified against the actual task description and synthetic contact database.
